articles.author: Joanna Stern
articles.title: The fight for the future of foldable phones is here - NBC News
articles.description: Samsung has owned the market for foldable phones. Now Apple is getting in on it. NBC News chief tech analyst Joanna Stern breaks it down.
articles.content:
Whats the difference between a Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, Fold 8 and Flip 8? Two fold, one flips and all three unfold your wallet. (Sorry.)
